description: Tracked migration matrix for Rust frontier numerics. Each entry records the kernel owner, Rust status, Python wrapper status, parity status, benchmark status, and migration priority.

kernels.notes: Rust scalar evpi_contract in bindings/rust/src/scalar.rs; Python facade in voiage.methods.basic.evpi remains the public surface. Covered by the CI-gated scalar CPU baseline benchmark.

Rust owns the full-sample linear EVPPI kernel; the Python facade routes the default path through the private PyO3 bridge and retains Python regression for custom models, subsampling, chunking, and native-extension absence.

Rust voiage-numerics owns versioned seeded-bootstrap, efficient-linear, and fail-closed moment-based kernels exposed through the private PyO3/runtime bridge. The public callback dispatcher routes efficient + linear and moment-based through native kernels; trial-design parsing and population scaling remain Python-owned. Python two-loop now has isolated seeded local-RNG and meaningful n_inner_loops contracts, but remains Python-owned because its posterior simulation semantics differ from Rust seeded bootstrap. Regression, random-forest efficient, adaptive, and NMA paths remain Python-owned until their explicit estimator, seed, and rank-deficiency contracts are frozen.
Rust scalar enbs_contract in bindings/rust/src/scalar.rs; Python facade in voiage.methods.sample_information.enbs remains the public surface. Covered by the CI-gated scalar CPU baseline benchmark.
Rust calculate_ceaf in bindings/rust/src/partial.rs; Python facade in voiage.methods.ceaf. Parity is verified through bridge and facade coverage; the committed foundational benchmark is CI-gated.
Rust dominance family (strong, extended, calculate_icers, cost_effectiveness_frontier) in bindings/rust/src/partial.rs; Python facade in voiage.methods.dominance.
Rust value_of_heterogeneity in bindings/rust/src/partial.rs; Python facade in voiage.methods.heterogeneity.
Python-only structural VOI in voiage.methods.structural. Rust migration deferred until benchmark evidence justifies the port.
Python-only network meta-analysis VOI in voiage.methods.network_meta_analysis and voiage.methods.network_nma. Rust migration deferred.
Python-only threshold VOI in voiage.methods.threshold. Low performance value for a Rust port.
Python-only validation VOI in voiage.methods.validation. Low performance value for a Rust port.
Python-only distributional VOI in voiage.methods.distributional. Low performance value for a Rust port.
Python-only perspective VOI in voiage.methods.perspective. Low performance value for a Rust port.
Python-only preference VOI in voiage.methods.preference. Low performance value for a Rust port.
